verdict_reasoning: TMED10 (p24δ) is a single-pass type I TM protein of the p24 family, predominantly resident in ER-Golgi intermediate compartment and cis-Golgi where it functions as a cargo receptor cycling between ER and Golgi. It has a documented minor plasma membrane pool via constitutive vesicular cycling through the secretory pathway, with the short cytoplasmic tail inside and ectodomain facing the lumen/extracellular space when at PM. Surface presence is real but minor relative to dominant Golgi/ERGIC residence.
